title: Founders Associate
requirements_met: Work directly with CEO on company OS, fundraising/IR, special projects: matches ex-Minima founder-facing generalist experience
Build AI automations: matches Ryan's current work building AI agents
Create decks and operate across functions: generalist operator background
Comfort with ambiguity in fast-scaling startup: founder-facing generalist
gaps: Ship code in production is in-scope (nothing out of scope) - Ryan is builder-leaning but not a full-time SWE
On-site 5 days/week in King's Cross London - workable from London but not Cambridge-friendly
preferred_met: Wants to build as well as operate within fast-scaling company

experience_fit.calculation: Mid-level ~8yr founder-facing generalist matches associate-to-CEO scope well

industry_match.calculation: AI-enabled consumer commerce startup; builds AI automations - strong AI alignment

salary_penalty.reason: Salary not listed; CEO-office FA roles at funded startups typically exceed GBP 50k floor

notes: Tilt: ex-Revolut founders building net-new way to buy/sell online; CEO Office role spanning OS, fundraising, AI automations, shipping code. Confirmed active via Ashby + startup.jobs.

must_haves.req: Operate directly with CEO on company OS, fundraising/IR, special projects
must_haves.note: Founder-facing generalist; supported $2.5m seed + $6.5m Series A, investor enquiries, decks, IR updates
Currently building AI agents with Claude Code — direct, current overlap
Ryan is builder-leaning (AI-agent orchestration) but NOT a production software engineer; no programming languages or SWE roles on CV

must_haves.req: Excellent written/verbal/visual communication; rapid self-directed learning
must_haves.note: Content/PR/deck-building track record; self-directed AI-agent learning
UK-authorized and relocating to London, but Cambridge-based and role is 5-day in-office

must_haves.req: Thrives in ambiguity, pressure, high-expectation founder environment

hard_blockers: 'Ship code in production' is in-scope and the ex-quant/data-scientist founders set a high technical bar; Ryan's non-SWE profile risks screen-out for the build half of the role
met_strengths: Founder-facing CEO-office + fundraising/IR experience is a clean match
Current AI-automation building aligns with role's build mandate
Consumer-tech / commerce domain is accessible (not regulated/specialist)
interview_match.one_line_verdict: Strong operator+AI-automation fit undercut by an explicit production-coding expectation from highly technical ex-Revolut founders — plausible only if they weight operating over engineering; live FA listing no longer on Tilt's Ashby board.
